privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying the "generate_report.py" script in "/home/ga/PycharmProjects/sales_reporting" to correctly process synthetic sales data ("data/transactions.csv"). The fixed script must output "weekly_sales_report.xlsx" with an updated conditional formatting rule ("greaterThan 500"). A passing score requires achieving at least 75 points according to the verification script.
